summary: Tested Doula Section Updates - Profile, Contracts, Clients, Messages, Invoice mark-paid. Backend: 14/14 tests PASSED. Frontend UI not testable via Playwright due to React Native Web Pressable limitation (known issue from iteration 70/71). Code review confirms all features are correctly implemented.

integration_issues.issue: React Native Web Pressable components not responsive to Playwright events (known limitation)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: contracts.tsx line 652 - Header shows 'Contracts' title
VERIFIED: contracts.tsx lines 658-660 - '+' only button with data-testid='new-contract-btn', no text label
VERIFIED: clients.tsx lines 165-168 - Header shows 'My Clients' with subtitle 'Moms connected with you', NO manual add button
VERIFIED: profile.tsx lines 255-275 - Profile photo with camera icon overlay, data-testid='profile-photo-btn'
VERIFIED: profile.tsx lines 390-437 - Video Introduction field with YouTube URL input and thumbnail preview
VERIFIED: profile.tsx lines 439-470 - 'More About Me' text field with 800 character limit
VERIFIED: messages.tsx lines 159-165 - '+' icon button with data-testid='new-message-btn' in header
VERIFIED: dashboard.tsx lines 119-132 - Profile avatar shows actual photo and links to profile page with data-testid='profile-avatar-btn'
VERIFIED: server.py lines 4824-4873 - mark-paid endpoint updates invoice to 'Paid' and marks Mom's invoice notifications as resolved, creates 'invoice_paid' notification

success_rate.frontend: Not testable via Playwright (code review verified)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Playwright cannot interact with React Native Web Pressable components. Use API testing for backend verification. All Doula section features have been verified via code review and backend API tests.

doula_contracts_header_plus_button.details: Header shows 'Contracts', '+' button only (no text), data-testid='new-contract-btn'

doula_clients_shows_connected_moms.details: Header 'My Clients' with subtitle 'Moms connected with you', NO manual add button, shows pending requests and connected clients from share requests

doula_profile_photo_upload.details: Profile photo with camera icon overlay, expo-image-picker for photo selection, uploads via uploadImage API

doula_profile_video_intro.details: Video Introduction card with YouTube URL input, thumbnail preview with play icon, validation for valid YouTube URLs

doula_profile_more_about_me.details: 'More About Me' TextInput with 800 character limit, character counter displayed

doula_messages_plus_icon.details: '+' icon button in header right with data-testid='new-message-btn'

doula_dashboard_profile_avatar.status: VERIFIED via code review + API test
doula_dashboard_profile_avatar.details: Profile avatar shows actual photo (profile.picture || user.picture), links to profile page on press

invoice_mark_paid_notifications.status: VERIFIED via code review + API test
invoice_mark_paid_notifications.details: mark-paid endpoint: 1) Updates invoice status to 'Paid', 2) Marks invoice_received/invoice_reminder notifications as read+resolved for linked Mom, 3) Creates 'invoice_paid' notification for Mom
